sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18705" key="a)xqi/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀχθ-ίζω</orth>, <sense id="n18705.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">load,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">Ἄραψ κάμηλον ἀχθίσας</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0614.tlg001:8:1" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Babr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
